raw_text:

{
  "claims": [
    "Governor Newsom's budget proposes $385 million for sustainable agriculture.",
    "The budget provides farms and ranches with the ability to help combat climate change.",
    "The budget prioritizes sustainable groundwater management to benefit the environment.",
    "$6.7 million is proposed as direct technical assistance to small and mid-sized farms.",
    "The budget allocates over $60 million to Listos CA for public engagement and community outreach to Spanish-speaking communities.",
    "Investments in health equity resources for Latino communities are included in the budget.",
    "Latinos in California continue to contract and die of COVID-19 at disproportionately high rates.",
    "Nearly $100 million in funds for telehealth is included in the budget to maintain and expand telehealth access established during the pandemic.",
